description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story office building with a flat, light blue roof and a symmetrical facade. The front and rear elevations feature large, evenly spaced windows arranged in two horizontal rows, separated by a band of wall and supported by vertical columns. The side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a central entrance on each end, marked by a small overhang. The building sits on a paved surface, suggesting an urban or commercial setting. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or off-white color, with subtle pinkish trim around the windows and base. The overall design is clean and functional, with a modern, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story office building with a flat blue roof, large symmetrical windows, and light-colored walls, set on a paved surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing two rows of large windows, vertical columns, and a flat blue roof.
description_view_1: Side view with a central entrance, two upper windows, and minimal window detailing compared to the front.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with two rows of large windows and vertical columns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with a central entrance and two upper windows.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, horizontal rows of large rectangular windows separated by vertical columns, evenly spaced across the front and rear facades.
